appraisal_events.evidence: « Ses paroles n’étaient qu’une réponse affaiblie, docile, presque un simple écho de mes paroles ; elle n’était plus que le reflet de ma propre pensée. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator represents the grandmother, in his dreams, as a weakened echo of himself, losing her former spontaneity and agency.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, the grandmother is diminished as a figure whose voice and presence are reduced to a pale reflection in the narrator’s dreams.
